1058.reason: [Missing increment of currentTokenIndex when an expected token is not found, causing potential infinite loops or repeated error reporting on the same position]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Missing increment of currentTokenIndex when an expected token is not found, causing potential infinite loops or repeated error reporting on the same position]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [When a required token is missing, the parser records an error but does not advance the token index or synchronize, causing subsequent parsing to fail or produce incorrect output. Additionally, for cases other than SEMICN, RPARENT, and RBRACK, no error is reported, violating the requirement to detect and report all syntax errors.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [Missing increment of currentTokenIndex when an expected token is not found, causing potential infinite loops or repeated error reporting on the same token]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [The method does not advance currentTokenIndex when an expected token is missing, causing infinite loops or repeated error reporting. Additionally, it fails to handle other missing token errors beyond SEMICN, RPARENT, and RBRACK, violating the grammar's error recovery requirements.]

602.reason: [Incorrect placement: should output <AddExp> only after parsing the full production, not before consuming operator and right-hand side]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect placement: should output <AddExp> only after parsing the full production, not before consuming operator and right-hand side]

615.reason: [Incorrect placement: same issue as in parseAddExp; <MulExp> is output prematurely before completing the binary operation]
